title: Submit validation failures surface as a generic toast; server field errors discarded

fix.extractor: client/src/lib/apiError.ts extractFieldErrors() — parses the ApiError '400: {json}' message and returns the server's fieldErrors map (null when absent)
fix.mapping: client/src/pages/SubmitResource.tsx submit onError — each fieldErrors entry is form.setError()'d onto its field (type 'server', first error focused); toast becomes 'Please fix the highlighted fields below.'; non-field errors keep the humanizeApiError fallback

evidence.repro: logged in at 1440x900, title + category + 59-char description valid, url 'https://example' (passes client zod, fails server isPlausiblePublicUrl)

fieldErrors.url: URL must have a valid hostname (e.g. https://example.com)

rendered.fieldMessage: URL must have a valid hostname (e.g. https://example.com) rendered at the URL field (FormMessage id *-form-item-message)
rendered.toast: Submission Failed — Please fix the highlighted fields below.
